snps.effect_template: HLA-DRB1 shared epitope tag SNP. Major genetic risk factor for seropositive RA.
PTPN22 R620W variant. Shared autoimmune risk allele (RA, T1D, lupus).
STAT4 signal transducer and activator of transcription 4. Interferon signaling in RA.
CTLA4 cytotoxic T-lymphocyte-associated protein 4. T cell co-stimulation regulation.
TRAF1/C5 TNF receptor associated factor 1. NF-kappa B and complement signaling in RA.
PADI4 peptidylarginine deiminase 4. Protein citrullination in RA pathogenesis.

recommendation_template: Don't smoke (strongest modifiable risk factor for RA). Maintain dental health (periodontitis linked to RA). Early diagnosis and treatment prevents joint damage.

studies.title: Genome-wide association study of rheumatoid arthritis
studies.finding: HLA-DRB1 shared epitope and PTPN22 are strongest common RA risk factors

studies.title: Genome-wide association study meta-analysis identifies seven new rheumatoid arthritis risk loci
studies.finding: Identified multiple RA susceptibility loci including STAT4, CTLA4, TRAF1/C5, and PADI4
